results.rendered_html:
anuvyadh 4 P.
1 To hit or pierce again; viddhamanuvidhyataḥ  Ms. 9. 43. 
2 To wound, pierce; kāmaśarānuviddhaḥ &c.
3 To fill or mix with, blend with, see anuviddha below.
4 To impel, urge.
